description_long: This cabinetry object features a modern, L-shaped design with a prominent back panel and a lower horizontal surface, likely intended for use as a bench with integrated storage or as a service counter. The main structure is composed of two rectangular volumes joined at a right angle, with the taller section serving as a backrest or partition and the lower section functioning as a seat or countertop. The surfaces are finished in a smooth, matte gray material, while the base sits on a contrasting dark rectangular platform, possibly simulating flooring or a mounting base. The cabinetry appears to have a seamless, handle-less design, emphasizing clean lines and minimalism. There are no visible doors, drawers, or hardware, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or open shelving. This object would be suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, lobbies, or outdoor plazas.
description: A modern, L-shaped cabinetry unit with a tall back panel and a lower horizontal surface, finished in matte gray and mounted on a dark base. The design is minimalistic with no visible hardware, ideal for public or urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the L-shaped structure with the tall back panel and lower seat or counter, highlighting the clean, handle-less design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the back panel and the right-angle connection between the two main sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the back panel and the solid, uninterrupted surface of the cabinetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the length of the lower section and the thickness of the back panel.
